song.title: This Little Light
song.lyrics:
[V1] Everywhere I go, I’m going to let it shine Everywhere I go, I’m going to let it shine Everywhere I go, I’m going to let it shine Let it shine, shine, shine, let it shine
[V2] This little light of mine, I’m gonna let it shine This little light of mine, I’m gonna let it shine This little light of mine, I’m gonna let it shine Let it shine, shine, shine, let it shine
[V3] Down in my heart, I’m gonna let it shine Down in my heart, I’m gonna let it shine Down in my heart, I’m gonna let it shine Let it shine, shine, shine, let it shine
[C] Shine Shine – shine Your light Shine Your light
